summary: Update mode: Tested GG33 numerology features (Life Path with Master Numbers 11/22/33, Chinese lucky/unlucky numbers, friendly/challenging numbers, Lo Shu Grid, Master Number badge). Added 7 new backend tests and 3 new frontend tests. All 36 backend and 38 frontend tests pass. Found 1 backend bug: stale cached luck scores missing new GG33 fields.

critical.issue: Stale cached luck scores don't include new GG33 fields (life_path_energy, friendly_numbers, challenging_numbers, life_path_traits, lo_shu_missing, lo_shu_strengths, lucky_number_meaning return null for users with pre-existing cached scores). When `existing` document is returned from DB, it doesn't have the new fields because it was inserted before GG33 feature was added.

integration_issues.flow: Dashboard GG33 Profile card - Energy section
integration_issues.issue: Profile card 'Energy:' section does not render for users with stale cached luck scores because life_path_energy is null in cached DB documents. Affects all pre-existing users until their cache expires (next day). GG33 card 'Friendly #' and 'Challenging #' labels show but no number badges render for same reason.

action_items: Fix stale cache bug: When fetching an existing luck score from DB, check if new GG33 fields (life_path_energy, friendly_numbers, etc.) are null/missing. If so, recalculate the score using calculate_luck_score() and update the cached document before returning. This affects all pre-existing users for their cached today's score.
Alternative fix: When returning cached score, merge with fresh GG33 calculations if any Optional GG33 field is None.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Master number test creates test_master_*@testastro.com and chinesenum_*@testastro.com users during test (no delete endpoint, isolated by UUID).
context_for_next_testing_agent: GG33 numerology features tested. New backend tests: TestGG33Numerology (7 tests) covering life_path fields, friendly/challenging numbers, master number detection (birth 1989-01-01 = LP 11), lo_shu fields, Chinese lucky number check. New frontend tests: 'dashboard shows GG33 Numerology card', 'GG33 card shows lucky number with Chinese meaning', 'profile card shows Life Path number and GG33 energy'. CRITICAL BUG: stale cached scores for test@astro.com return null for life_path_energy, friendly_numbers, etc. because they were cached before GG33 feature. New users get correct data. test@astro.com / test123 still used as stable login user for dashboard tests.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: GET /api/luck/today fetches existing DB document and returns it directly (line 824: 'if existing: return LuckScoreResponse(**existing)'). Documents cached before GG33 feature have null for new Optional fields. Fix: add recalculation logic when GG33 fields are missing, e.g., 'if existing and existing.get('life_path_energy') is None: recalculate and update'. Reproduction: login as test@astro.com, check /api/luck/today - life_path_energy is null.
